entity.label: Uriel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The chief of the Kohathites at the time when the ark was brought up to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 15:5, 11).

nodes.label: Uriel
nodes.description: The chief of the Kohathites at the time when the ark was brought up to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 15:5, 11).

verses.text: Of the sons of Kohath; Uriel the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twenty:
And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
